purpose: Clean-core Python RTL DSL, simulation, verification, PPA, and documentation release

environment_prefix.scope: only for features kept in the release

include_from_current_tree.notes: Use the current clean-core implementation as the release package
Keep as worked example and regression-backed datapath cookbook companion

allowed: Python and compiled C++ simulation for semantic closure

minimum_after_rename: PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q rtlgen/tests/test_dsl_import.py -k 'round_shift or signed_shift or signed_unsigned or storage_contract or authoring_intent'
PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q rtlgen/tests/test_cosim.py -k 'collect_external_artifact_bundle or compile_and_run_with_iverilog_stages_compile_flags or auto_backend'

PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q jpeg_decoder/tests/test_idct_basic.py jpeg_decoder/tests/test_cpp_idct.py jpeg_decoder/tests/test_dequant_idct.py jpeg_decoder/tests/test_cpp_entropy_dequant.py jpeg_decoder/tests/test_verilog.py

current_boundaries: arbitrary multi-port memory contracts are not a stable emitted-RTL feature
arbitrary non-zero read latency storage is limited or fail-fast
broad macro mapping is out of scope
iverilog is smoke/compatibility, not universal SystemVerilog signoff
PPA reports are early engineering guidance, not final implementation signoff
CDC analysis is report-oriented and pattern-aware, not a full formal proof
